raw_consumer_statement:
I placed an order with an XXXX vendor for a total amount of around {$1200.00}, but the products have not been delivered. I have made multiple attempts to resolve the issue directly with the vendor, including contacting them via XXXX messages on only a few but not all of the following dates : XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX Despite my repeated efforts, the vendor has not provided a solution or meaningful response. I also reached out to the shipping company multiple times but was told that the issue falls outside their grace period and they are unwilling to assist further. 

I have filed several disputes with American Express, including filing for a refund due to the failure to deliver the products, but no resolution has been reached, and the disputes have not been resolved in my favor. I am now requesting further action to resolve this matter. 

As per the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ), I am entitled to dispute the charge when there is a failure to receive the products as agreed. 

I have all relevant documentation and proof of my attempts to resolve this issue, including communication logs with the vendor and shipping company. I have proof on my camera that nothing was delivered. Nothing was also signed by me. These are all facts. Should I not receive a satisfactory resolution, I am prepared to escalate this matter further.
